message:
feat(E4.F2.T5): add log explainability checks and incident triage decision trees (31 tests)

Triage decision trees for 8 failure modes with required log field
verification. ExplainabilityReport evaluates whether operators can
diagnose each failure from logs alone, with coverage percentages
and missing field identification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
